message:
chore(beads): add comprehensive UX/UI Premium Polish audit

## Overview

Created a complete issue hierarchy for elevating Phage Explorer to premium
product quality (Stripe/Linear/Figma level). This audit identified gaps
across 9 categories with detailed implementation guidance.

## Epic: Premium UX Polish - Stripe-Level Quality Audit (phage_explorer-vntd)

### Features Created (9 total):

**P0 - Critical:**
1. Error States & Empty States (phage_explorer-lge5) - 5 tasks
   - Skeleton component system, 3D model error recovery, loading states

2. Mobile Touch UX Overhaul (phage_explorer-y5wb) - 5 tasks
   - Touch targets, gene map touch-friendly, landscape fix, swipe threshold

**P1 - High Priority:**
3. Interaction Feedback Enhancement (phage_explorer-2dzx) - 4 tasks
   - Timing tokens, button scale/shadow, list selection, backdrop hover

4. Keyboard Navigation Polish (phage_explorer-vss3) - 4 tasks
   - Shortcut onboarding, command palette categories, conflict detection

5. Accessibility Compliance (phage_explorer-v6fm) - 4 tasks
   - ARIA labels for canvas, keyboard accessible HUD, axe-core audit

**P2 - Medium Priority:**
6. Data Loading UX (phage_explorer-s6nf) - 3 tasks
   - Animated progress, time estimation, mobile freshness indicator

7. Visual Consistency (phage_explorer-taos) - 3 tasks
   - Design tokens, color migration, badge standardization

8. State Management Fixes (phage_explorer-wq08) - 3 tasks
   - Gene navigation bug, scroll preservation, list visibility

9. Performance Perception (phage_explorer-pcn6) - 4 tasks
   - Resource preloading, worker preloading, canvas throttling, skeletons

## Structure

- 1 Epic
- 9 Features (children of epic)
- 35 Tasks (children of features)
- Cross-feature dependencies linking shared components

## Key Dependencies

- All skeleton-consuming tasks depend on unified Skeleton component
- Timing token tasks must complete before interaction feedback
- Token migration depends on tokens.css creation

## Documentation

Every issue includes detailed comments with:
- Problem statement and current state analysis
- Solution architecture with code examples
- File paths and line numbers
- Testing criteria and success metrics
- Rationale for why this matters

This audit serves as a comprehensive roadmap for premium UX polish.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
